# Live Workshop: How to Get Paid Instantly as a Freelancer

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-08-12 13:45:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 1008

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

If you're a freelancer or service provider, you know the drill:
you finish the job, send the invoice… and then wait to get paid.

Sometimes for days. Sometimes for weeks. 😩

But what if you could skip the wait and get paid instantly?

In our next FREE live workshop, we’ll show you exactly how to
make that happen!

👉 [Workshop] How to Get Paid Instantly as a Freelancer or Service
Business ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..1P1W3hqBMPlX0tA109Llm6yC0HkfNKZXw0yO_ZFXq2Y )
🗓️ Wednesday, August 27, 2025 | 🕥 10:30 AM EST

Using WP Simple Pay, you can get paid on the spot with a simple
payment button. No waiting. No invoices. Just instant payments.

Plus, there’s a free version of the plugin available, so you can
get started at no cost.

Here's what you'll learn:

* Why invoices slow down your payments
* How to get paid fast with WP Simple Pay - no online store
needed
* Why branding your payment form builds trust and helps clients
pay on time
* How to save time and avoid payment follow-ups

We’ll walk you through the full process so you can get paid
faster and look more professional doing it.

Ready to stop waiting and start getting paid instantly?

👉 Yes, Save My Free Workshop Spot! 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..1P1W3hqBMPlX0tA109Llm6yC0HkfNKZXw0yO_ZFXq2Y ) 👈

See you there,

Syed Balkhi
Founder of WPBeginner
